{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Enforcers
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A trio of [[Enforcers]] approached [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
